title: Software Update - DFU - Updating screen above 90%
scenario: Firmware update via Device Settings > Software Update shows "Verifying" message and "Almost there, don't leave yet" text from 90% to 99% progress
steps: Tap on the desired device name to open Device Settings
Navigate to Device Settings → Software Update
Observe the progress bar as the update proceeds
When the progress reaches 90%, note the screen change
expected: When the firmware update progress reaches 90%, the screen displays a "Verifying" message on the progress bar along with the text "Almost there, don't leave yet". This screen is present from 90% to 99%.
